subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up after the conference. I'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

Are you available for a 30-minute call during any of the following windows?

• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Regarding your request for direct contact details for senior leadership, I'm unable to share internal personnel information. For publicly available contact information, please visit our website.

Please confirm which slot works for you and I'll send the calendar invite.

Best regards
